property.name: The Barn
property.title: The Barn | Guidebook
property.subtitle: Tresowes Green Cottage
property.description: Welcome Book for The Barn at Tresowes Green Cottage

contact.addressFull: Tresowes Green Cottage, Tresowes, Ashton, Helston, Cornwall, TR13 9SY, GB
directions: More accurate than a street address, this points to the exact spot for arrival. Enter it into the free what3words app to find us easily. Alternatively, GPS is helpful but won't bring you to our place and often takes people down very narrow lanes. It is simplest to follow the directions below.

From the A30 take the A394 towards Helston. After hamlets of Rosudgeon and Newtown pass the Praa Sands Golf Course on the right and there is a sign for Tresowes to the left. Tresowes Green is the first property on the right (after the layby).

From Helston follow the A394 towards Penzance and look for the second Tresowes sign after the village of Ashton. Tresowes Green is the first property on the right, after the layby and two tall chimneys.

parking.summary: You can park in the driveway by the pergola.
detail: You can park in the driveway by the pergola.
One car per property. If you need more space for an additional car, there is a parking bay nearby.
As you drive down, please park on the left hand side.
Close the entrance gates after you enter the property. Only lower the right hand side bolt down after closing the gates.

hero.heading: Welcome to The Barn at Tresowes Green Cottage
hero.body: The Barn is a cosy one-room retreat set in the grounds of Tresowes Green Cottage. We are delighted to share it with you. We hope this guestbook helps to make your stay with us enjoyable. Please let us know if you require any further information.

detail: Check-in time is between 3:00 PM and 10:00 PM
Contact us if you need checking in at other times, we will be happy to help subject to availability.

access.summary: There is a lockbox containing your house key.
detail: There is a lockbox containing your house key.
We will email you the access codes prior to arrival. Don't forget to check your email.
We might be here to meet you and show you the property, otherwise we will meet during your stay.

welcomePack.summary: We provide you with a welcome pack.
detail: We provide you with a welcome pack to start your stay.
Normally we include orange juice, butter, milk, biscuits, eggs, jams and bread.
Please let us know if you have any dietary allergies in which case we could alter the basket content.

wifi.summary: Wifi is available and the code is provided in the Barn.
detail: Wifi is available and the code is provided in the Barn. Please enjoy our wifi. If you have any problems, please contact us.

houseManual.intro: The Barn is a cozy, one-room retreat equipped with everything you need for a comfortable stay. We provide toiletries, towels and bathrobes for your convenience. The kitchen is stocked with essentials to get you started including coffee, tea, sugar, oil, vinegar, salt and pepper. You'll also find a welcome pack upon arrival.

facilities.title: Laundry
facilities.summary: There is a washer/dryer in the kitchen.
detail: There is a washer/dryer in the kitchen. The machine instruction manual is in the bottom drawer in the kitchen.
We provide detergent and fabric softener for your convenience.
There is also an outdoor wash line for those who wish to use it.

facilities.title: Coffee
facilities.summary: There is a coffee machine in the kitchen.
detail: There is a coffee machine and a caffetiere in the kitchen.
Coffee and sugar are provided.
The instruction manual for the coffee machine is in the kitchen drawer.

facilities.title: Television & Media
facilities.summary: There is a flat screen TV.
detail: There is a flat screen Smart TV.
Netflix subscription is provided.
The mini hifi offers bluetooth, dab radio and FM radio.

facilities.title: Smoke Detectors
facilities.summary: There are smoke, heat and CO1 detectors.
detail: There are smoke, heat and CO1 detectors.
This has been tested before your arrival.
There is a fire extinguisher in the kitchen.
Please do not tamper with the alarms.

facilities.title: Towels & Linen
facilities.summary: Egyptian cotton towels and linen are provided.
detail: Egyptian cotton towels, bathrobes and linen are provided.
We provide beach towels for your use. Please do not take the bathroom towels outside the property.
If you require a change of towels during your stay please contact us.

facilities.title: Heating
detail: Heating is available.
The thermostat is on a shelf next to the vaccumm cleaner by the dining area.
If you need assistance with the heating please contact us.

facilities.title: Garden
detail: Enjoy the outside seating area.
Please return cushions indoors after use.
If possible, please do not leave cushions outside overnight.

facilities.title: Barbecue
facilities.summary: There is a charcoal barbecue for guests use.
detail: There is a charcoal barbecue for guests use.
If you have used any available charcoal please replace it.
Make sure of having cleaned the barbecue and the tools ready for future guests.

facilities.title: Transport
facilities.summary: Taxis and Buses that operate in the area.
detail: These are links to a couple of local taxis and the Cornwall First Bus.

facilities.title: Waste & Recycle
detail: Compost: Please place compostable waste in the compost bins. No egg shells.
</br>

Recycling: Recyclable waste should be placed inside the green bin liner in the metal dustbin on the side of The Barn. Recyclable items are glass, metal(tins, cans and jar lids), plastic, paper and cardboard. This is sorted at the depot.
</br>
Waste: All other rubbish should be placed in the kitchen bin.
</br>
Septic Tanks: Please only use toilet paper in the toilet. Sanitary products, dental floss, etc need to be disposed of in the bin.
</br>

On departure: On departure, remember to include the bathroom waste within the kitchen waste. Please bag all waste and put bags in the blue wheelie bin beside the garage. Loose waste cannot be collected.

facilities.title: General Rules
facilities.summary: Some policies and rules for a pleasant stay.
detail: Please no noise outside after 11:00 pm.
No smoking or vaping inside the property.
No pets allowed.
The property is for the number of guests specified in the booking.

departure.label: Checkout
departure.title: Departure
departure.intro: We hope you have had an enjoyable stay in The Barn and that everything has been great for you. We kindly ask you to check this list before departure. We look forward to welcoming you back.

items.title: Check out
detail: We kindly ask you to check-out before 10:00 am.
This will give us time to clean the Barn before the next guest arrives.
If you'd like to request a late check-out, please contact us.

items.title: Kitchen
items.summary: Please clean up any dirty dishes and put them away.
detail: Please clean up any used utensils and dishes and put them away.

items.title: Power Off
items.summary: Please turn off the stove, oven, lights and TV.
detail: Please, make sure you turn off the stove, oven, lights and TV.

items.title: Furniture
items.summary: Please replace any furniture to the original position.
detail: Please, replace any furniture to the original position.
If something is missing or damaged please tell us in advance.

items.title: Linen & Towels
items.summary: Place all bed linen and used towels in the laundry basket.
detail: Place all the used bed linen, used towels, kitchen towels, cloths and robes in the grey laundry basket provided.
Do not strip the mattress and pillow protectors unless necessary.

items.title: Barbecue
items.summary: Please remember to clean up the barbecue.
detail: Please remember to clean up the barbecue.
If you have used any available charcoal please replace it.

items.title: Waste & Recycle
detail: Compost: Please place compostable waste in the compost bins. No egg shells.
</br>

Recycling: Recyclable waste should be placed inside the green bin liner in the metal dustbin on the side of The Barn. Recyclable items are glass, metal(tins, cans and jar lids), plastic, paper and cardboard. This is sorted at the depot.
</br>
Waste: All other rubbish should be placed in the kitchen bin.
</br>
Septic Tanks: Please only use toilet paper in the toilet. Sanitary products, dental floss, etc need to be disposed of in the bin.
</br>

On departure: On departure, remember to include the bathroom waste within the kitchen waste. Please bag all waste and put bags in the blue wheelie bin beside the garage. Loose waste cannot be collected.

items.title: Keys
items.summary: Please hand the keys to us or return them to the lockbox.
detail: Please hand the keys to us or return them to the lockbox and follow the instructions you received on arrival.

items.title: Feedback
items.summary: We would love to hear about your stay.
detail: We would love to hear about your experience at The Barn.
Sign our guestbook.
If you enjoyed your stay please leave a review on the booking platform you used.
If there is anything that we could do to improve the experience of our guests, please tell us in person.
Thank you for staying with us!

fire.summary: In case of fire, leave building and call 999.
steps: Leave the building and go to the parking area
Call the Fire Brigade by telephoning 999
Contact Leslie or Johnny
fire.note: There is a fire extinguisher for use in the case of a small fire, where the exit is clear.

medical.summary: For ambulance where life is at risk, call 999 or 112.
detail: For ambulance where life is at risk, call 999 or 112.
For other medical issues call 111 or use the NHS 111 online service.
There is a first aid kit in the bathroom.
Please inform Leslie or Johnny if you have an accident during your stay.
In an emergency contact the emergency services.
Dial 999 or 112 if you or someone else is in immediate danger.
For non-emergencies call 101.

restaurants.name: Stones Reef Beach Bar & Kitchen
restaurants.description: Beachside bar and kitchen right on Praa Sands, open all day for drinks, coffee, and food.

restaurants.name: Kota Kai
restaurants.description: Locally sourced, high quality food overlooking the harbour.

restaurants.name: The Victoria Inn
restaurants.description: Reputedly one of the oldest inns in Cornwall

restaurants.name: The Cabin Beach Cafe
restaurants.description: Great food, stunning views and a very warm welcome

restaurants.name: The Peppercorn Cafe
restaurants.description: Tranquil location, breath-taking coastal walks, and a friendly welcome.

restaurants.name: Bakehouse
restaurants.description: Restaurant in the heart of Penzance

restaurants.name: Argoe
restaurants.description: Cornish fish and seafood, natural wine

restaurants.name: Mackerel Sky Cafe
restaurants.description: Seafood bar in the heart of Newlyn

restaurants.name: Nauti But Ice
restaurants.description: Ice cream, cafe, pizza, sandwiches by the harbour.

restaurants.name: The Packet Inn
restaurants.description: Old Coaching Inn with locally sourced food.

restaurants.name: Amélie's
restaurants.description: Informal menu with light bites, small and large plates.

beaches.name: Praa Sands
beaches.description: A wide, sandy beach just 5 minutes from Tresowes Green Cottage, great for swimming and surfing.

beaches.name: Rinsey Cove
beaches.description: A secluded National Trust cove with dramatic cliffs and a ruined mine engine house.

beaches.name: Prussia Cove
beaches.description: A sheltered rocky cove with clear water, once the haunt of Cornwall's famous smugglers.

beaches.name: Perranuthnoe
beaches.description: A sandy family beach with views across Mount's Bay to St Michael's Mount.

beaches.name: Kynance Cove
beaches.description: One of the most photographed beaches in Cornwall, with turquoise water and serpentine rock stacks.

beaches.name: Polurrian Cove
beaches.description: A quiet, sheltered sandy beach on the Lizard, popular with families and swimmers.

beaches.name: Porthleven Beach
beaches.description: A dramatic shingle and sand beach backed by the charming harbour village of Porthleven.

beaches.name: Gunwalloe Beach
beaches.description: A National Trust beach with a medieval church set into the cliffs right on the sand.

beaches.name: Marazion Beach
beaches.description: A long sandy beach with iconic views of St Michael's Mount across the bay.

beaches.name: Longrock Beach
beaches.description: A quiet stretch of Mount's Bay shoreline popular with walkers and birdwatchers.

attractions.name: Minack Theatre
attractions.title: Welcome to Minack Theatre - Cornwall's iconic cliff-top theatre
attractions.description: Open-air cliffside theatre above Porthcurno, with performances, gardens, and sea views.

attractions.name: Jubilee Pool
attractions.title: The UK's Most Celebrated Saltwater Lido - Jubilee Pool, Penzance, Cornwall
attractions.description: Cornwall's celebrated Art Deco lido on Penzance's Promenade.

attractions.name: Glendurgan Garden
attractions.title: Glendurgan Garden - National Trust
attractions.description: Explore Glendurgan's three garden valleys that run down to the sheltered beach at Durgan.

attractions.name: Trengwainton Garden
attractions.title: Trengwainton Garden - National Trust
attractions.description: Explore sheltered gardens bursting with exotic trees, shrubs, and colourful seasonal planting.

attractions.name: Barbara Hepworth Museum
attractions.title: Barbara Hepworth Museum and Sculpture Garden - Tate
attractions.description: Discover Barbara Hepworth's studio and sculptures in the artist's uniquely preserved garden.

attractions.name: Helston Railway
attractions.title: Helston Railway - Heritage Steam and Diesel Railway
attractions.description: Ride a heritage steam and diesel railway through the Cornish countryside near Helston.

attractions.name: Penlee House
attractions.title: Penlee House - Cornwall's Gallery and Museum
attractions.description: A gallery and museum in a park setting, with strong collections connected to West Cornwall.

attractions.name: St Michael's Mount
attractions.title: St Michael's Mount - Cornwall's Iconic Island Castle
attractions.description: Visit the island castle, harbour, and gardens just off the coast at Marazion.

attractions.name: Tate St Ives
attractions.title: Tate St Ives - Modern and Contemporary Art Gallery
attractions.description: See modern and contemporary art inspired by St Ives and the wider Cornish landscape.

attractions.name: Trebah Garden
attractions.title: Trebah Garden - Subtropical Valley Garden
attractions.description: Subtropical valley garden with dramatic planting, winding paths, and a private beach.

attractions.name: Paradise Park
attractions.title: Paradise Park - Family-Friendly Wildlife Attraction
attractions.description: Family-friendly wildlife attraction with birds, animals, gardens, and indoor play.

attractions.name: Telegraph Museum
attractions.title: Porthcurno Telegraph Museum - Victorian Communications Heritage
attractions.description: Explore the story of global communications from the Victorian telegraph era to today.

attractions.name: Godolphin
attractions.title: Godolphin - National Trust Historic Estate
attractions.description: Visit the National Trust's Godolphin estate and explore its historic house and gardens.

attractions.name: Geevor Tin Mine
attractions.title: Geevor Tin Mine - Cornish Mining World Heritage Site
attractions.description: Historic mining museum and heritage site with dramatic coastal views near Land's End.

attractions.name: Museum of Cornish Life
attractions.title: Museum of Cornish Life - Helston's Local History Museum
attractions.description: A local museum packed with objects and stories about everyday life in Cornwall.

attractions.name: Tremenheere Sculpture Gardens
attractions.title: Tremenheere Sculpture Gardens - Contemporary Art in a Garden Setting
attractions.description: Contemporary art and sculpture set within beautiful gardens overlooking Mount's Bay.

attractions.name: Land's End
attractions.title: Land's End - England's Westernmost Point
attractions.description: England's westernmost point, clifftop trails, the iconic signpost, and sweeping Atlantic views.

attractions.name: Seal Sanctuary
attractions.title: Cornish Seal Sanctuary - Rescue and Rehabilitation Centre
attractions.description: Meet rescued seals and other animals at this well-loved sanctuary in Gweek.

restaurants.label: Places to Eat
restaurants.title: Restaurants, Cafes, Bars & Eateries
restaurants.intro: Some recommended places to eat in West Cornwall, conveniently located near us. Please note, a car is necessary to reach these destinations. We have personally enjoyed dining at several of these establishments and are delighted to recommend them. Others come highly praised by our guests and friends.

beaches.label: Nearby beaches
beaches.title: Beaches & Coves
beaches.intro: Praa Sands is the closest beach to Tresowes Green Cottage, just a 5-minute drive or approximately a 25-minute walk away. We've also included information on other stunning and beautiful beaches in the area for you to explore.

attractions.label: Things to do
attractions.title: Visits - Attractions - Gardens
attractions.intro: Explore the wonderful attractions, visits, and gardens in the area, most of which are just 5 to 30 minutes away by car. Please note, during high season, it's advisable to check if advance ticket booking is required.

shopping.label: Supermarkets & Fish Shops
shopping.title: Food Shopping
shopping.intro: Here are some links and directions to the main supermarkets and fishmongers in the area.
